tools.name: list_fixtures
tools.description: Upcoming and recent fixtures with the de-vigged SkipOdds Index: every surveyed bookmaker price averaged and stripped of its margin, so fair win probabilities sum to exactly 100%. Covers 13 sports from 69+ bookmakers. Omit sport for soccer.

tools.name: get_fixture
tools.description: A single fixture by id with its full de-vigged consensus: fair probability per outcome, fair odds, bookmaker count, last update.

tools.name: fixture_movement
tools.description: How the SkipOdds Index moved over time for one fixture — timestamped consensus snapshots. hours defaults to 24 (max 72, or 336 on the Scale tier).

tools.name: tournament_outrights
tools.description: Soccer tournament-winner probabilities, normalised across the still-alive field (eliminated teams excluded).

tools.name: golf_tournaments
tools.description: Golf tournaments with normalised outright-winner probabilities. Pass key for one tournament with its full priced player field.
